# AstroAligned — Full Content Index
> Where Zodiac Meets BaZi — complete site content for AI crawlers.

## Site Info
- Title: AstroAligned | Where Zodiac Meets BaZi
- Description: Western Zodiac tells you who you are. Chinese BaZi tells you what you're made of. Two systems. One sky.
- Language: English
- Topics: Western Astrology, Chinese BaZi, Four Pillars of Destiny, Horoscopes, Five Elements, Zodiac Compatibility
